_meta.verified_by: reviewer (Chrome multimodal access to Municode Supplement 24, codified through Ord. 74-2025, supp. date 2026-04-01)

tier_meanings.verified: Direct ordinance citation pulled by reviewer. Default confidence >= 0.90.
tier_meanings.prohibited_by_absence: Self-service-storage exhaustive Municode search did not surface this zone. Standard zoning interpretation: only listed uses are allowed -> prohibited.
tier_meanings.needs_direct_read: Reviewer flagged for one more direct read before locking. Confidence < 0.75.
tier_meanings.convention: Inferred from US zoning conventions (residential zones never permit self-storage).
tier_meanings.overlay_defer: Should be modeled in overlay_codes TEXT[], not as a base zone_use_matrix row.
tier_meanings.tombstone_candidate: May have been renamed/retired in a recent Municode supplement. Tombstone iff no parcels carry the code.

reviewer_followups: M-1: §122.0 lists 'moving and storage establishments' + 'Wholesale sale and storage' but NOT 'self-storage facilities' explicitly. §115.0 POR distinguishes these as separate uses. One direct browser read of §122.0 settles it.
PEC, NT, MXD: prohibited by absence is likely but worth one direct read each.
CCT: not visible in current Municode TOC; may be retired. Check parcels first.
CAC-CLI: current codification splits CAC base (§127.5) + CLI overlay (§127.3). Restructure to base_zone_code + overlay_codes.
Add new canonical zones from recent supplements: TNC, R-APT, HC, R-H-ED.

rows.notes: §131.0(D)(4): 'A conditional use may be granted in the B-2 district for self-storage facilities, Indoor, provided...'. Indoor only -- outdoor self-storage NOT conditional in B-2.

§115.0 POR permitted-use list explicitly includes 'self-storage facilities' alongside flex space, contractor's office, warehouses, light industrial. Reviewer FLIP from prohibited placeholder to permitted -- coverage win.

AMBIGUOUS in current codification. §122.0 lists 'moving and storage establishments' + 'Wholesale sale and storage' but NOT 'self-storage facilities' explicitly. §115.0 POR distinguishes these as separate uses. Could go either way. DOWNGRADE from previous 'permitted' brief_likely. Flag for one direct §122.0 read.
Brief: 'likely PERMITTED'. M-1's ambiguity raises doubt about manufacturing zones generally. Confidence lowered until reviewer or operator does one direct ordinance read.

rows.cited_subsection: §127.5 (CAC base) + §127.3 (CLI overlay)
rows.notes: RESTRUCTURE NEEDED: reviewer confirmed current codification splits this into CAC base + CLI overlay (was a single code in the 2010 metadata). Recommend: zone_code='CAC' (base verdict, likely prohibited) with separate CLI overlay logic that promotes the base verdict to permitted. Apply as transitional placeholder until restructure ships.

rows.cited_subsection: §118.0 (by absence)
rows.notes: Self-storage absent from exhaustive Municode self-service-storage search. B-1 is small-scale neighborhood commercial.

rows.cited_subsection: (by absence)
rows.notes: Self-storage absent from Municode search. B-R is rural commercial.

rows.cited_subsection: (by absence)
rows.notes: Shopping Center -- specifically retail; self-storage absent from Municode search.

rows.cited_subsection: (by absence)
rows.notes: Planned Employment Center -- self-storage absent from Municode search. 'Employment Center' could plausibly include storage; reviewer flagged for direct read.

rows.cited_subsection: §125.0 (needs read)
rows.notes: New Town (Columbia) is complex with sub-districts. Reviewer flagged for direct §125.0 read before locking. Note existing row 'N T' is at confidence 0.80 (human=true, conditional) -- consider when promoting.

rows.cited_subsection: §127.0 (needs read)
rows.notes: Mixed Use Districts vary by approved plan. Reviewer flagged for direct §127.0 read.

rows.cited_subsection: §127.4 (by absence)
rows.notes: Transit Oriented Development -- pedestrian/residential focus; self-storage absent from Municode search.
Community Center Transition -- NOT VISIBLE in current Municode TOC. May have been renamed or retired. Apply script will tombstone iff no parcels in Howard MD carry zone_code='CCT'.

SW (Solid Waste Overlay) is an overlay district, NOT a base zone. Should be modeled in overlay_codes TEXT[] on affected parcels, not as a zone_use_matrix row. Apply script will SKIP this row -- do not write to zone_use_matrix.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-ED Residential Environmental Development
rows.notes: Residential. Self-storage never permitted in US residential districts.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-20 Single 20,000 SF
rows.notes: Residential single-family. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-12 Single 12,000 SF
rows.notes: Residential single-family. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - RSI Senior-Institutional
rows.notes: Senior-Institutional residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SC Single Cluster
rows.notes: Residential single cluster. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SC + Institutional overlay
rows.notes: Residential single cluster + Institutional Overlay. Overlay adds schools/churches but doesn't introduce storage. Base R-SC prohibits self-storage.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SA-8 Single Attached
rows.notes: Residential single attached (townhomes). Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-SA-8 + Institutional overlay
rows.notes: Residential single attached + Institutional Overlay. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-VH Village Housing
rows.notes: Village Housing residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-A-15 Apartments
rows.notes: Apartment residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - R-MH Mobile Homes
rows.notes: Mobile Home residential. Self-storage prohibited.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - RC w/ Density Exchange Option overlay
rows.notes: Rural Conservation + Density Exchange Option. Conservation/rural-residential base, no self-storage. DEO is a density-transfer mechanism, doesn't add storage uses.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - RR w/ Density Exchange Option overlay
rows.notes: Rural Residential + Density Exchange Option. Rural residential, no self-storage.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - CC Convenience Center
rows.notes: Convenience Center -- small neighborhood-scale retail; self-storage absent from Municode search.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - HO Historic Office
rows.notes: Historic Office. Historic-preservation overlay zones never permit auto-oriented commercial.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - PSC Planned Senior Community
rows.notes: Planned Senior Community. Senior-housing PDs prohibit non-residential commercial uses.

rows.cited_subsection: Howard County zoning - PGCC Planned Golf Course Community
rows.notes: Planned Golf Course Community. Golf-course PDs are residential-with-amenity, no commercial storage.
